input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Solution-verification performed in a different operating mode than the COU.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 application-domain coverage; proto-taxonomy D-VER-06

case_context.cou: surrogate predicts a transient pressure spike for a surge-margin decision
case_context.decision_consequence: surge margin on the transient prediction

input.raw_artifact: Verification summary — internal-flow surrogate. Solution-verification residuals are low and documented; all verification was performed in steady-state. The context of use is a fast transient pressure spike for a surge-margin decision. Transient-mode verification is not included.

answer_key.gold_mechanism: Solution-verification was performed at steady-state, but the COU is a fast transient the verification did not cover, so the documented residuals do not characterize the transient behaviour the decision depends on.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

forbidden_claims: asserts the transient prediction is wrong (a verdict the mode mismatch does not support)
treats steady-state verification as coverage for the transient COU

hardness.obvious_signal: solution-verification residuals against the reference are low and well-documented
hardness.conflicting_signal: the verification was all at STEADY-STATE; the COU is a fast transient, and the surrogate's transient behaviour is unverified — verification present but for the wrong operating mode

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40: verification must cover the COU's operating mode; steady-state verification does not cover transient behaviour.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
